Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Removed From Arbitration And To Order Judicial Mediation Based On Stipulation
Off Calendar Jun-02-2010 Set For Trial On Nov-29-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-12-10 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 611
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Enkhbaatar Banushka's Motion to be Removed from Arbitration and to Order Judicial Mediation Based on Stipulation is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor objection, the tentative ruling to grant the motion is adopted. The motion is ordered granted. Case is removed from arbitration and ordered to judicial mediation. Order signed in open court. The court ordered the case set for a Jury Trial on 11/26/2010 at 9:30 AM in Department 206 with a Mandatory Settlement Conference. A Mediation Compliance hearing is scheduled for 9/08/2010 at 10:00 AM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
